pinyin: cong1 ming5 yi1 shi4 , meng3 dong3 yi1 shi2
defs: see 聰明一世，糊塗一時|聪明一世，糊涂一时[cong1 ming5 yi1 shi4 , hu2 tu5 yi1 shi2]

pinyin: cong1 ming5 yi1 shi4 , hu2 tu5 yi1 shi2
defs: (idiom) even the wisest can have a momentary lapse in judgment; every man has a fool in his sleeve

pinyin: cong1 ming2 fan3 bei4 cong1 ming2 wu4
defs: (idiom) a clever person may become the victim of his own ingenuity; cleverness may overreach itself; too smart for one's own good
too clever by half; excessive ingenuity
